name: hi-way-shuttle
description: Hi-Way-Shuttle — Premium scheduled shuttle service platform

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/web && npm run build -w packages/api
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/api" "npm run dev -w packages/web"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start -w packages/api
scripts.setup: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
